title: How to Setting Up a NOWPayments Digital Store: The Complete Creator Guide — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, or other restricted countries, you're likely frustrated with PayPal's hold periods, Gumroad's payout delays, and the lengthy USDT settlement process. You need a reliable and efficient way to receive payments for your digital products, without the hassle of KYC requirements or subscription fees. That's where NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce come in – a game-changing solution that will get you up and running in no time.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

NOWPayments supports over 300 cryptocurrencies across multiple blockchain networks. For practical digital product sales, the most useful options are USDT on Tron (fastest settlement, lowest fees — under $1), USDT on Ethereum (widely held, slightly higher fees), Bitcoin (highest global recognition, 10-60 minute confirmation time), Ethereum (widely supported, moderate fees), Solana (fast and cheap, growing adoption), and BNB on Binance Smart Chain (popular in Southeast Asia). The Web3 Wallet Connect module displays all supported coins to buyers during checkout and handles the QR code generation and exchange rate display automatically. You do not need to manage multiple wallets manually — NOWPayments routes everything through your configured wallet addresses.
What You Need Before You Start

To set up your NOWPayments digital store, you'll need to create a NOWPayments account, obtain a unique API key, and download Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine. You'll also need to integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect and Admin Dashboard for a seamless user experience. Don't worry if you're not tech-savvy – Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) includes everything you need to get started, with priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

With NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine, you can set up a payment and delivery pipeline that's automated, efficient, and scalable. Simply connect your NOWPayments API key to your Unchained Commerce dashboard, configure your payment settings, and start selling your digital products. Once a customer makes a purchase, the Core Shop Engine will automatically deliver the product, eliminating the need for manual intervention.
NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's solution eliminates KYC requirements, hold periods, and subscription fees.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

To go live and make your first sale, simply upload your digital products to your Unchained Commerce store, configure your payment settings, and start promoting your store. Once a customer makes a purchase, the payment will be processed instantly, and the product will be delivered automatically. You can track your sales and analytics in real-time using the Admin Dashboard, making it easy to optimize your marketing strategy and increase sales.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once you've got your NOWPayments digital store up and running, you can focus on scaling your business. With Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you'll get priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide to help you optimize your store's performance. You can also use the Admin Dashboard to track your sales, analytics, and customer behavior, making it easy to identify areas for improvement and make data-driven decisions.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products? You can receive crypto payments for your digital products using NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine. Simply connect your NOWPayments API key to your Unchained Commerce dashboard, configure your payment settings, and start selling your digital products. Payments will be processed instantly, and products will be delivered automatically.
With instant payment processing and automated delivery, you can focus on creating and selling your digital products.
